headline: Jim Cramer: Dollar General Is a Hedge Fund Favorite as Rising Gas Prices Fuel Discount Retail
summary: Jim Cramer sees hedge funds quietly loading up on a familiar discount retailer as gas prices squeeze consumer budgets, and one recent earnings report suggests the trade may already be paying off.
